title: Using Your Cart in iMicrobe
author: Alise J Ponsero
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.r9nd95e

steps.instruction: After browsing through the iMicrobe datasets, the data of interest can be added to your personal cart using the 'Add to cart button'. Click on the Cart icon on the top right of your screen to access the current cart and explore the selected datasets. In the cart, you can remove datasets using the 'Remove' button. a

You can name and save your cart for later use using the 'save as' button on the top of your screen. To retrieve a stored cart, use the dropdown menu on the top of your screen. You can copy the content of your saved cart to the current cart using the 'Copy to current' button. Finally, you can delete or empty a saved cart using the 'delete' and 'empty' buttons respectively. a
You can share a saved cart using the 'share' button on the top of the screen. This provides a public link that you can share to other iMicrobe users. a
